interface.name: yetios_cursor_manager_v1

description.summary: Global cursor handoff from Wine to compositor

interface.description: Wine sends a wl_surface containing the Win32 arrow cursor at boot. The compositor copies the pixels, stores them permanently, and uses them as the global cursor forever. One call. Done.

request.name: set_cursor

description.summary: hand the Win32 cursor to the compositor

request.description: The surface must have committed content before this request. The compositor copies the pixel data and owns it permanently.

arg.name: surface
arg.summary: surface with cursor bitmap attached and committed
